prompt: Write a 350-word partner program structure for openpatent.ai. Cover: (1) the 3 partner tiers — (a) Refer (anyone can refer, 10% revenue share for 12 months on the referred customer's first $50k spend, paid quarterly), (b) Resell (certified IP-tech consultancies, 25% revenue share for life + co-marketing, requires 5 deployments/yr), (c) Build (MCP-tool builders + system integrators, 35% revenue share for life + co-engineering + joint roadmap vote, requires 1 MCP tool published), (2) the 5 partner personas — IP boutique associations (AIPLA, IPOEF, INTA), gov/defense integrators (Booz Allen, Leidos, SAIC), AI-asset tooling vendors (HuggingFace, Weights & Biases, Comet), legal-tech platforms (Clio, MyCase, PracticePanther), academic TTO consortia (AUTM, ARL), (3) the 4 enablement assets — partner portal (one-login), co-branded sales deck, certified partner engineer (CPE) course (8hr, free), deal-reg form with 24h SLA, (4) the 3 commercial protections — deal-reg exclusivity (60 days), 2× payout on multi-year deals, $0 payout if the customer churns in <90 days, (5) the quarterly partner summit (CSOAI Hive Summit, London + SF alternating), (6) the 12-month target — 80 Refer partners, 12 Resell, 4 Build, $1.8M partner-sourced ARR. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {partner_tiers:[3 strings], partner_personas:[5 strings], enablement_assets:[4 strings], commercial_protections:[3 strings], summit:string, year_1_targets:[4 strings]}.
